chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1742 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 15268/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Anwar Sangi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Hadi Bux on behalf of SHO P.S Market and SIP Ghulam Shabbir Abbasi SHO P.S Bhirya City. -.-.-. Today, Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Memon, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.4, who is also present in person. Respondent No.4-Muhammad Nawaz Khushk, who is a Head Constable at P.S Bhirya City, is present in person and submits that on the contrary petitioner has taken loan from him sometime back but has not returned the same and he is not causing any harassment to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G has also filed parawise comment, in which it has been mentioned that police officials have not sided with respondent No.4 in causing harassment to the petitioner. With above observation and direction that even if respondent No.4 has any genuine grievance against the petitioner, the same can be addressed only through due process of law and petitioner should not be harassed, this Constitutional Petition is disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
